inputs.text: Bird's eye view looking down at a stunning Korean woman with chestnut brown hair swept into a sleek high ponytail, angular jawline and strong defined brows, serene contemplative expression with eyes gently closed. She lies on weathered cobblestones of an old European alleyway, wearing a sheer mesh layered avant-garde outfit with architectural draping. Shot on 85mm f/1.4, creamy bokeh dissolving the ancient stone walls and iron balconies above. Overcast soft diffused light wrapping her flawless porcelain skin, visible pores and natural texture, dewy highlight on cheekbones. Styled editorial makeup with gradient berry lips and smudged smoky liner. Medium shot capturing her figure against the narrow street. Cinematic color grading, muted warm tones. Hyperrealistic SDXL rendering, extreme detail.
